tasks.label: Upgrade Home Assistant to latest dev
Install a specific version of Home Assistant
tasks.command: echo 'Enter version (e.g. 2025.3.0):' && read version && pip install homeassistant==$version

tasks.label: Resync config from .devcontainer
tasks.command: cp ${workspaceFolder}/.devcontainer/configuration.yaml /config/configuration.yaml && cp ${workspaceFolder}/.devcontainer/ezviz_burst_scripts.yaml /config/ezviz_burst_scripts.yaml && python3 ${workspaceFolder}/scripts/merge_ezviz_dev_script.py ${workspaceFolder} && echo 'Config + scripts merged. Restart HA to apply.'
